question: Show names of clubs in descending order of average earnings of players belonging.
sql: SELECT club.Name, AVG(player.Earnings) AS AverageEarnings FROM club JOIN player ON club.Club_ID = player.Club_ID GROUP BY club.Club_ID ORDER BY AverageEarnings DESC;

back_translation.intent: 获取俱乐部名称，按球员收入降序排列

semantic.reason: 目标表未明确关联关系，聚合函数缺失，排序字段应为平均收入而非单个球员收入，缺少GROUP BY子句导致无法正确计算每个俱乐部的平均值
